work.name: OhhDenny Services, LLC
work.summary:
We assist small businesses with cyber security, software and hardware installation, network configuration, and web development using content management systems like WordPress along with JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3.

Current business sites built

  • We Got The Leads
  • Aeterna Executive Chauffeur Service
  • Operation Solace

Ray-ville Enterprises

  • Ray-ville Enterprises Portal
  • Rayville Property Management
  • Real Home and Lead Inspections

How we help

Helping nonprofits and small businesses help themselves with tech through web development and computer services.

What we do

  • Design, build, and maintain client websites, including regular updates and ongoing site care
  • Implement and maintain APIs with ExpressJS on projects following Agile methodologies
  • Assist with technical documentation
  • Support clients with cyber security guidance, hardware setup, networking, and troubleshooting

Notable project

Ideal Nursing Services, Inc — Wireless Network Upgrade

Led a network modernization that transitioned the office from wired to wireless infrastructure. Managed a small project team, measured the building, and created network diagrams for client approval. Removed legacy wiring, installed and configured wireless access points, upgraded workstations, and built out a new server-room rack with PoE for the server, hub, and router. Also handled operating system installations, basic cyber security hardening, and troubleshooting throughout the engagement.

work.name: Civitech
work.summary: As a Full Stack Engineer, I built and maintained web applications for voter outreach using Java, PostgreSQL, and JavaScript. I also developed APIs and UIs for CiviTech's platform with Angular and TypeORM, improving tools for candidates and campaign staff.

work.name: iHeartMedia, Inc
work.summary: On the Music Lab team, I maintained and improved a web app for iHeartRadio program directors to manage song airtime. I worked with NodeJS, AWS, and ReactJS. I also conducted a Proof of Concept for a GraphQL-based AI platform to automate market data analysis.

work.name: Booz Allen Hamilton, Inc
work.summary: As an Elastic Stack SME for the Air Force, I created training courses and learning documentation. I was also a member of an Agile Coaching team and served as an Application Lead/Senior Developer for the DoD, managing AWS EC2 instances and building a Java application for IT disaster recovery plans.

work.name: Sevatec, Inc
work.summary: I was a Web Developer on the Implementation Team for the redesign of US Embassy websites at the Department of State. I developed websites and mobile apps on AWS using WordPress and created a plugin to incorporate travel alerts from a JSON feed.

work.name: Buchanan & Edwards, Inc
work.summary: As Application Lead, I developed and maintained features for Java and ASP.NET/C# applications for the Department of State's Human Resource Time & Attendance payroll application.

work.name: Creative Information Technology, Inc
work.summary: As Application Lead, I developed and maintained features for Java and ASP.NET/C# applications for the Department of State's Human Resource Time & Attendance payroll application.

work.name: Intepros Federal Consulting, Inc
work.summary: As a technical consultant for the Joint Chiefs of Staff at the Pentagon, I gathered requirements, led application demos, and developed an application using ASP.NET/C#. I also handled SharePoint 2003 administration tasks.

work.name: IBM, Inc
work.summary: I served as a Web Developer/Database Analyst at National Defense University and a Java Developer at FEMA, working on web-based systems for disaster recovery and information management in an Agile environment.

volunteer.summary: Sharing my career and college experience, mentoring Computer Science students from underserved communities, serving as a panelist for 'Work From Home Best Practices', and reviewing resumes.

Our mission is to transform individual lives and whole communities through Hip-Hop. We do this through public art creation, teaching courses in the core elements of Hip-Hop, publishing a global academic journal on Hip-Hop, sending artists abroad and hosting Teach-Ins and retreats to build the capacity of scholars, artists and arts educators and arts managers from throughout the country and around the world.
